arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Price of defender revealed as fears about Virgil van Dijk exit grow
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly learn the price tag of one of Europe's finest young defenders, but rumours persist that Virgil van Dijk could leave the club.

arts.ttl: Slot: We need to be at our very best to beat PSG
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes Liverpool will have to produce one of the best performances of their exceptional season so far if they are to beat Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League. "That is clear, because I see Paris Saint-Germain as being one of the strongest teams in Europe," said Slot, at his pre-match press conference.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed new Cody Gakpo injury scare for PSG showdown
arts.sum: Reds could be missing a key attacker once again for heavyweight last-16 first-leg tie

arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘Working Hard’ to Secure PSG Target, With €6M per-Year Offer From Inter Milan
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been keeping a close eye on Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months and nearly brought him in last summer. Now, they’re making another attempt to land him, but one club is determined to win the transfer battle. arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon red card decision made as Liverpool learn Newcastle fate for Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Newcastle United will be without Anthony Gordon for the Carabao Cup Final next month - after making their appeal decision.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot said referee Michael Oliver to blame if Liverpool missed out on title
arts.sum: Slot and his assistant Sipke Hulshoff were both shown red cards in the aftermath of the Reds’ 2-2 draw against Everton at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Joao Neves Reveals Detailed Breakdown of PSG’s Plan to Stop Liverpool’s Attack
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain know they have a challenging task ahead, but midfielder Joao Neves shared how they plan to execute their tactics to get a positive result against Liverpool on Wednesday night at the Parc des Princes. arts.ttl: Newcastle star Lewis Hall ruled out of Carabao Cup final - as Eddie Howe suffers another blow ahead of showpiece against Liverpool
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY CRAIG HOPE: Newcastle defender Lewis Hall will miss the Carabao Cup final in yet another blow for Eddie Howe, Mail Sport can reveal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Face Key Absence? Arne Slot Drops Fitness Concern Before PSG Clash
arts.sum: Liverpool have been in top form this season, but after a weekend off, they’ll head into their Champions League first-leg matchup against Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes either refreshed or a bit out of rhythm. arts.ttl: Liverpool rival Barcelona for Leao - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are considering a move for AC Milan forward Rafael Leao, Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez was blocked from leaving in January and Manchester City are targeting Leicester's teenage sensation Jeremy Monga.
